texto: Sometimes you have to stop trying to control everything and let life happen the way it's supposed to, Tess. Even if it's not exactly the way you wanted.But what if it's not even a little like you wanted?Then you deal with it and keep going.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Lord: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “Sometimes you have to stop trying to control everything and let life happen the way it's supposed…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, letting-go, wanted pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
